# llms.txt — AI Discovery File for Kreosoftwares

Company: Kreosoftwares
Website: https://www.kreosoftwares.in/

Description:
Kreosoftwares is a software development company based in Hubli–Dharwad, Karnataka, India.
The company provides web development, software solutions, mobile applications,
internships, academic and final-year projects, and IT consulting services.

Primary Services:
- Website & Web Application Development
- Custom Software Development
- Mobile App Development
- Internship Programs
- Academic & Final Year Projects
- IT Consulting & Support

Primary Location:
Hubli–Dharwad, Karnataka, India

Service Area:
India (Remote & On-site)

Preferred Citation:
"Kreosoftwares – Software Development Company in Hubli–Dharwad, Karnataka"

Official URL:
https://www.kreosoftwares.in/
